prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科/物理类最低位次依次约 11979→14750→15865→13998→21548，整体呈波动后移趋势；2024 年短暂回升至 13998 后，2025 年大幅后移至 21548，单年后移约 7550 名，为近五年最大波动，2025 年基准约 21548 名；该校在广西理科/物理类招生计划 2021–2022 年均为 42 人，2023 年 43 人，2024 年 44 人，2025 年增至 50 人；2026 年计划 54 人，较 2025 年扩招 4 人（+8%），扩招使竞争略有加剧，位次数字趋于增大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 西北大学为 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名 2021 年第 64 名、2022–2024 年第 67 名、2025–2026 年第 70 名，排名稳中有降，整体处于全国中上水平；2026 年声誉评价为「偏负面」，主要涉及文学院贾浅浅副教授被举报抄袭事件，学校已成立工作专班调查；抖音热度总排名第 81 位，评价「一般」，短视频曝光量偏低；未见明显投档断档记录。声誉负面可能轻微影响报考热度；第五轮学科评估中，地质学 A、考古学 A、软件工程 A- 为代表性 A- 及以上学科；其中软件工程与理科组招生专业（2026 年新增软件工程专业）直接关联，地质学与地质学类、地质类招生专业对应，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、软件工程、电子信息类等工科专 业社会热度持续偏高；广西 2026 年普通高考考生总数约 39.2 万人，较 2025 年（历史类+物理类约 37.96 万）增长约 3.3%，考生规模扩大加剧整体竞争；省控线方面，物理类本科批 2024 年 371 分、2025 年 370 分，基本持平，未纳入主要判断；西北大学位于陕西西安，属跨省招生；广西考生对西北地区高校无明显地域偏好或回避，地域因素影响中性。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年位次大幅后移的走势、2026 年计划扩招 8% 使竞争加剧、本省考生总数增长约 3.3% 进一步推高竞争烈度，以及声誉偏负面带来的轻微降温效应，在 2025 年基准 21548 名基础上预计位次继续后移；预测最低位次约 22632 名，区间 22132–23132 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category were approximately 11979→14750→15865→13998→21548, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend; after a brief recovery to 13998 in 2024, it significantly dropped to 21548 in 2025, with a single-year backward shift of about 7550 places, the largest fluctuation in the past five years, with a 2025 baseline of approximately 21548; the enrollment plan for science/physics category in Guangxi was 42 students in 2021–2022, 43 in 2023, 44 in 2024, and increased to 50 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 54 students, an increase of 4 students (+8%) compared to 2025, which slightly intensifies competition and tends to increase ranking numbers.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northwest University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; in the Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranked 64th in 2021, 67th in 2022–2024, and 70th in 2025–2026, showing a stable but slightly declining trend, overall at the upper-middle level nationally; the 2026 reputation evaluation is 'somewhat negative', mainly involving the plagiarism accusation against Associate Professor Jia Qianqian from the School of Literature, for which the university has established a special task force to investigate; Douyin popularity ranks 81st overall, with an evaluation of 'average', indicating low short video exposure; no obvious enrollment gaps were recorded. The negative reputation may slightly reduce application enthusiasm; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Geology A, Archaeology A, and Software Engineering A- are representative A- and above disciplines; among them, Software Engineering is directly related to the physics group enrollment majors (newly added Software Engineering major in 2026), and Geology corresponds to Geology and Geological majors, which have some appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Software Engineering, and Electronic Information continue to have high social popularity; the total number of Guangxi 2026 ordinary college entrance examination candidates is about 392,000, an increase of about 3.3% compared to 2025 (history + physics categories about 379,600), with the expanded candidate pool intensifying overall competition; regarding provincial control lines, the physics category undergraduate batch was 371 points in 2024 and 370 points in 2025, basically stable, not included as a main judgment factor; Northwest University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, and is a cross-provincial enrollment; Guangxi candidates have no obvious regional preference or avoidance for universities in the northwest region, making the regional factor neutral.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward shift in rankings in 2025, the 8% enrollment expansion in 2026 intensifying competition, the approximately 3.3% increase in the number of local candidates further raising competition intensity, and the slight cooling effect from the negative reputation, based on the 2025 baseline of 21548, the ranking is expected to continue moving backward; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 22632, with a range of 22132–23132.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:

- Software Engineering (Chang'an Campus, Intelligent Software Innovation Experimental Class)
- Electronic Information Class (Chang'an Campus, including Communication Engineering, Electronic Information Engineering, Electronic Science and Technology)
- Intelligent Science and Technology (Chang'an Campus).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Information and Computing Science (Chang'an Campus, Network Security Experimental Class)
- Integrated Circuit Design and Integrated Systems (Chang'an Campus)
- Physics Class (Chang'an Campus, including Applied Physics, Materials Physics, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering)
- Economics (Taibai Campus, Mathematical Economics Experimental Class)
- Financial Mathematics (Chang'an Campus).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Chemistry Class (Chang'an Campus, including Applied Chemistry, Chemical Biology, Materials Chemistry)
- Chemical and Pharmaceutical Class (Chang'an Campus, including Chemical Engineering and Technology, Pharmaceutical Engineering, Energy Chemical Engineering)
- Bioengineering (Chang'an Campus)
- Biological Science (Taibai Campus, Base Class)
- Pharmacy Class (Taibai Campus, including Pharmacy, Chinese Materia Medica)
- Food Science and Engineering (Taibai Campus)
- Geology (Chang'an Campus, Base Class)
- Resource Exploration Engineering (Chang'an Campus, Digital Intelligence Energy Experimental Class)
- Geographic Science Class (Chang'an Campus, including Physical Geography and Resource Environment, Human Geography and Urban-Rural Planning, Geographic Information Science).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 22632, range 22132–23132. For rankings within the range, it is recommended to mainly fill in Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 majors as a stretch and Tier 3 majors as a safety; for rankings significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 22000), focus on applying for top Tier 1 majors like Computer Class and Software Engineering; for rankings near the upper limit (e.g., outside 23000), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年文科/历史类最低位次依次约 1984→2090→2004→1662→3483，2021–2024 年基本在 1662–2090 区间窄幅波动，2025 年大幅后移至 3483，单年后移约 1821 名，为近五年最大波动，2025 年基准约 3483 名；该校在广西文科/历史类招生计划 2021–2022 年均为 18 人，2023–2025 年均为 17 人；2026 年计划 13 人，较 2025 年缩招 4 人（-23.5%），缩招幅度显著，使竞争明显加剧，位次数字趋于减小。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 西北大学为 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科排名近年稳定在第 64–70 名区间，属全国中上水平综合类大学；2026 年声誉评价为「偏负面」，主要涉及文学院贾浅浅副教授被举报抄袭事件，学校已成立工作专班调查，该事件对文科类专业的报考心理可能产生一定降温效应；抖音热度总排名第 81 位，评价「一般」，曝光量偏低；第五轮学科评估中，考古学 A 为文科类代表性 A 级学科，与文物与博物馆学专业直接对应；中国语言文学、外国语言文学、哲学、法学等学科未进入 A- 及以上等级，但学校整体文科底蕴深厚。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 文科类专业社会整体热度平稳，法学、中国语言文学类仍为传统热门方向；广西 2026 年普通高考考生总数约 39.2 万人，较 2025 年增长约 3.3%，考生规模扩大加剧整体竞争；省控线方面，历史类本科批 2024 年 400 分、2025 年 402 分，基本持平；西北大学位于陕西西安，属跨省招生；广西考生对西北地区高校无明显地域偏好或回避，地域因素影响中性。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年位次大幅后移的异常走势、2026 年计划缩招 23.5% 使竞争显著加剧、本省考生总数增长约 3.3% 进一步推高竞争烈度，以及声誉偏负面（贾浅浅事件）对文科报考的轻微降温效应，在 2025 年基准 3483 名基础上预计位次明显前移；预测最低位次约 2942 名，区间 2442–3442 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 1984→2090→2004→1662→3483. From 2021 to 2024, they fluctuated narrowly within the 1662–2090 range. In 2025, there was a significant drop to 3483, a single-year decline of about 1821 places, the largest fluctuation in five years. The 2025 baseline is approximately 3483. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts/history category in Guangxi was 18 students in 2021–2022, 17 students in 2023–2025, and 13 students in 2026, a reduction of 4 students (-23.5%) compared to 2025. This significant reduction intensifies competition, causing rankings to decrease.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northwest University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university. Its Soft Science ranking has been stable in the 64–70 range in recent years, placing it among the upper-middle level comprehensive universities nationwide. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is 'somewhat negative,' mainly due to the plagiarism accusation against Associate Professor Jia Qianqian from the School of Liberal Arts. The university has established a special task force to investigate, which may have a slight cooling effect on the application psychology for liberal arts majors. Its Douyin popularity ranks 81st overall, with a rating of 'average' and low exposure. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Archaeology received an A grade, a representative A-level discipline in liberal arts, directly corresponding to the Cultural Heritage and Museology major. Chinese Language and Literature, Foreign Languages and Literatures, Philosophy, and Law did not reach A- or above, but the university has a strong overall liberal arts foundation.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The overall social popularity of liberal arts majors is stable, with Law and Chinese Language and Literature remaining traditionally popular directions. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in Guangxi is approximately 392,000, an increase of about 3.3% compared to 2025, intensifying overall competition. Regarding provincial control lines, the history category undergraduate batch was 400 points in 2024 and 402 points in 2025, essentially unchanged. Northwest University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, and is an inter-provincial enrollment institution. Guangxi examinees show no obvious preference or avoidance for universities in the northwest region, so the regional factor has a neutral impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the abnormal significant drop in rankings in 2025, the 23.5% reduction in enrollment plan for 2026 significantly intensifying competition, the 3.3% increase in the number of local examinees further raising competition intensity, and the slightly negative reputation (Jia Qianqian incident) having a mild cooling effect on liberal arts applications, rankings are expected to move significantly forward based on the 2025 baseline of 3483. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2942, with a range of 2442–3442.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Cultural Heritage and Museology (Taibai Campus)
- Law (Taibai Campus, Smart Law Innovation Experimental Class)
- Chinese Language and Literature (Taibai Campus, including Chinese Language and Literature, Teaching Chinese as a Second Language).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Philosophy (Taibai Campus)
- Foreign Languages and Literatures (Chang'an Campus, including English, Japanese, Russian).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Public Administration (Taibai Campus, including Administrative Management, Human Resource Management, Labor and Social Security).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 2942, range 2442–3442. If your ranking is within the range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, use Tier 1 majors for a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 2400), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 majors such as Cultural Heritage and Museology and Law. If your ranking is near the upper limit of the range (e.g., outside 3400), it is recommended to use Tier 3 majors like Public Administration as safety.
